description:
We have a terrific line up of bands and activities throughout the weekend. We encourage new bands and also love our old favourites! There should be music for everyone to enjoy!

There are a wide range of children’s activities to keep the little festival-goers busy while adults enjoy an ale or a glass of prosecco in the sunshine.

There will be lots of activities such as races, boulder throwing, face painting and many more activities to enjoy.

Dressing up is encouraged for both children and adults alike!!

bands.name: Open Mic Night
bands.detail: An open mic with various singers and bands. Come along and have a sing song. Raising money for St Margaret's Hospice and Abigail's Footsteps.

bands.name: Autumn Red
bands.detail: Autumn Red is a six-piece powerhouse blending the grit of southern rock, the soul of country, and the hooks of modern pop. Born in 2023, they bring raw energy, rich harmonies, and unforgettable melodies to every stage they hit. With a sound that’s as bold as it is heartfelt, Autumn Red lives by the motto: “Rock and roll spirit, country heart.” Whether it’s a small bar or a festival crowd, their music feels like home - loud, proud, and made to make you move. [Follow on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/Autumnreduk/)

bands.name: Rock-it Fuel
bands.detail: Rock-it Fuel are an electrifying and highly entertaining four-piece band that is guaranteed to get your heart pumping and your feet moving. We specialise in performing lively rock and pop covers from various eras, ranging from classic hits to modern-day chart-toppers. Our exceptional musical set is packed with high-energy tunes that are sure to get you grooving and singing along in unison. Whether you’re looking to dance the night away or simply enjoy some great live music, our electrifying performances are sure to leave you with an unforgettable experience that will have you bouncing all the way home. [Follow on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/rockitfuelmusic/)
